info.title: MonoGame Content Builder:
info.description: Builds optimized game content for MonoGame projects.

options.name: --build
options.description:
Build the content source
file using the
previously set
switches and options.
Optional destination
path may be specified
with
"sourceFile;destFile"
if you wish to change
the output filepath.

options.name: --clean
options.description:
Delete all previously
built content and
intermediate files.

options.name: --compress
options.description:
Compress the XNB files
for smaller file
sizes.

options.name: --config
options.description:
The optional build
config string from the
build system.

options.name: --copy
options.description:
Copy the content source
file verbatim to the
output directory.

options.name: --help
options.description: Displays this help.

options.name: --importer
options.description:
Defines the class name
of the content
importer for reading
source content.

options.name: --incremental
options.description:
Skip cleaning files not
included in the
current build.

options.name: --intermediateDir
options.description:
The directory where all
intermediate files are
written.

options.name: --launchdebugger
options.description:
Launch the debugger
before building
content.

options.name: --outputDir
options.description:
The directory where all
content is written.

options.name: --platform
options.description:
Set the target platform
for this build.
Defaults to Windows
desktop DirectX.

options.name: --processor
options.description:
Defines the class name
of the content
processor for
processing imported
content.

options.name: --processorParam
options.description:
Defines a parameter name
and value to set on a
content processor.

options.name: --profile
options.description:
Set the target graphics
profile for this
build.  Defaults to
HiDef.

options.name: --quiet
options.description:
Only output content
build errors.

options.name: --rebuild
options.description:
Forces a full rebuild of
all content.

options.name: --reference
options.description:
Adds an assembly
reference for
resolving content
importers, processors,
and writers.

options.name: --waitfordebugger
options.description:
Wait for debugger to
attach before building
content.

options.name: --workingDir
options.description:
The working directory
where all source
content is located.
